name: Hextech Alternator

passives.name: Revved
passives.effects: Damaging an enemy champion deals {{as|65 '''bonus''' magic damage}}.

effects_structured.raw: Damaging an enemy champion deals 65 bonus magic damage (40-second cooldown).

simpleDescription: Increases Ability Power. Deal bonus magic damage on attack periodically.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Revved is modeled as proc damage, so it should not recursively trigger spell-effect chains.
Player-visible behavior: once every 40 seconds, the next damaging champion interaction adds a 65 bonus-magic-damage burst.
Page notes indicate Revved can proc from 0-damage champion-hit instances and that the Revved damage itself is not blocked by spell shield.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Hextech Alternator
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Revved cooldown and interaction notes (proc-damage classification, 0-damage proc behavior, and spell-shield handling)
